prompt: What is the total number of credits offered by each department?

inputData.question: What is the total number of credits offered by each department?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the total number of credits offered by each department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the total number of credits offered by each department?"},"startedAt":1771855501902,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the total number of credits offered by each department. I need to join the departments table with the courses table on department_id, then group by department and sum the credits. The departments table has id, code, and name columns. The courses table has department_id and credits columns. I'll group by department and order by total credits descending for clarity.","sql":"SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.code,
  d.name,
  SUM(c.credits) AS total_credits
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY total_credits DESC NULLS LAST, d.name ASC","assumptions":["Departments may not have any courses, so LEFT JOIN is used to include all departments","Credits are summed across all courses in each department","Results are ordered by total credits descending, with departments having no courses appearing last"]},"endedAt":1771855534771},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT

data.name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.code,
  d.name,
  SUM(c.credits) AS total_credits
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY total_credits DESC NULLS LAST, d.name ASC

data.name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.code,
  d.name,
  SUM(c.credits) AS total_credits
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.code, d.name
ORDER BY total_credits DESC NULLS LAST, d.name ASC
